dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION One full applicator (5 g) of terconazole vaginal cream 0.4% (20 mg terconazole) should be administered intravaginally once daily at bedtime for seven consecutive days. Before prescribing another course of therapy, the diagnosis should be reconfirmed by smears and/or cultures and other pathogens commonly associated with vulvovaginitis ruled out. The therapeutic effect of terconazole vaginal cream 0.4% is not affected by menstruation.
